title: 有馬記念の後に・変わらない強さ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Neither Hishi Amazon nor Narita Brian win the
Arima Kinen, but Narita Brian attracts a lot of
attention with her outstanding performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon channels her frustration into her
workout. She vows to get a proper rematch
against Narita Brian at the Arima Kinen next year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After talking it over, we decide to set the Osaka
Hai as our next goal, and it's going to be first
place or bust!
